behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names the file src/bun.js/api/bun/dns.zig and the buffer pattern 'var name_buf: [1024]u8 = undefined' which is what tests assert on.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the problem (no fixed buffer, use heap alloc, free memory) but doesn't give exact code changes.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests accept multiple allocation patterns (stackFallback, .alloc, arena.create, .dupeZ, .dupe, GeneralPurposeAllocator) scoped to the lookup function.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests primarily do regex pattern matching on source text (e.g., _extract_lookup_fn_body + regex for 'stackFallback', 'var name_buf:[1024]u8'); zig ast-check only verifies parse, not runtime behavior against hostnames >1024 bytes.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub/no-op cannot pass because test_no_fixed_buffer_used requires removing the buffer AND test_dynamic_allocation_in_lookup requires alloc patterns within the lookup fn body, plus test_lookup_function_has_real_logic guards against empty stubs.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests check removal of fixed buffer, presence of dynamic alloc, and (likely) defer/free patterns matching the three instruction requirements.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with comment headers (pass-to-pass static, repo_tests, fail-to-pass pr_diff) and descriptive names.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is a code fix, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths and commands appear correct (src/bun.js/api/bun/dns.zig, zig ast-check, zig fmt).

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the file but localization of the specific lookup function within it is left to the agent; the 1024 size is part of the bug description.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: This is a code fix task, not an agentmd/config edit.
